states.description: Android home screen with app icons
Phone app showing Contacts tab with list or empty state
visual_cues: contact list items like 'Quick contact for X'
Phone field with Mobile label dropdown

states.description: Dropdown menu showing phone label options (Home, Work, Mobile, etc.)
visual_cues: list of label options overlaying form
options like Home, Work, Mobile, Main, Other

states.description: Contacts list showing newly created contact

transitions.postcondition: Contact persisted and visible in list

strategies.name: CREATE_NEW_CONTACT_VIA_PHONE_APP
steps: click First name field, input_text first name
click/Tab to Last name field, input_text last name
click Phone field, input_text phone number
strategies.success_signal: Contacts list displays the new contact name ('Quick contact for <name>')
strategies.fallback: If Save not visible, scroll up in form; if Contacts tab not shown, re-click Contacts in bottom nav

strategies.name: CREATE_NEW_CONTACT_VIA_CONTACTS_APP
steps: fill First name, Last name, Phone
strategies.success_signal: Return to contacts app home with new entry in Device list
strategies.fallback: If + not found, use Phone app path

strategies.name: FILL_CONTACT_DRAFT_WITH_CUSTOM_LABEL
steps: click Phone field and input phone number
click 'Show dropdown menu' next to Mobile label
strategies.success_signal: Phone label field shows the selected label and all fields populated
strategies.fallback: If dropdown option index uncertain, read the list items and match by text

categories.name: ADD_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Application opened to a list/overview screen with an affordance to create a new item
abstract_steps: Navigate from launcher to the target application's list screen
Invoke the create-new-item affordance (floating action button or explicit 'Create' entry)
Focus each required input field in order and enter the corresponding value
Confirm by activating the primary commit control
Verify the new item appears in the list
failure_modes: Committing before all required fields are filled
Missing the create affordance because it is off-screen or behind a tab
verification_checklist: New item's identifier is visible in the list view
Return to list state (not still in editor)

categories.name: EDIT_ENTRY_FIELD_WITH_ENUM_LABEL
categories.precondition: Editor form open with a field that has an associated enum label selector
abstract_steps: Fill primary value field with input_text
Choose the desired label from the option list
Confirm the label field reflects the chosen value
failure_modes: Clicking the value field instead of the dropdown trigger
Selecting wrong option because list indices shift after opening
verification_checklist: Label field text matches requested value
Value field retained its entered text

categories.name: CREATE_DRAFT_WITHOUT_COMMIT
categories.precondition: Editor form reachable and task specifies not to persist
abstract_steps: Adjust any optional attributes (labels/types) as specified
Stop before invoking the primary commit control
Declare task complete while editor still shows draft state
failure_modes: Accidentally activating the primary commit control
Navigating away and losing the draft
verification_checklist: All requested values are visible in their fields
Editor screen is still active (not returned to list)

categories.name: NAVIGATE_TO
abstract_steps: Identify the target app icon or use open_app by name
If app opens to a non-target subsection, switch tabs/drawer to reach target section
failure_modes: App icon not on current launcher page
Landing on wrong tab inside a multi-tab app
verification_checklist: Expected primary affordances (e.g., create button) present
